summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was present or invented. Security-sensitive refs are routed individually; non-security open PRs are kept as independent work because they need proof, review, or maintainer judgment rather than duplicate/superseded closeout.

actions.reason: Independent open bug-fix PR needing proof, not a duplicate/superseded closeout target.
Independent open fix candidate; no close or merge action is allowed in this plan.
Useful but blocked by draft state, failed proof, and unresolved review findings; keep as independent work.
Independent open fix for #45314, but not ready for closeout or merge.
Security-boundary hook execution work is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup.
Session permission and sensitive transcript storage hardening must route to central security handling.
Independent substantial fix candidate; not a duplicate/superseded closeout item.
Rescue watchdog and service-repair behavior crosses security/availability boundary and is out of Clownfish cleanup scope.
Android/Wear gateway auth and credential-handling work belongs in central security/maintainer review, not automated cleanup.
Potentially related to #90817, but not enough proof to close as duplicate or fixed-by-candidate; keep independent for maintainer review.
